design.description: 4-driver tri-state bus using bufif1 primitives. One-hot driver selection. X injected on driver 2 source FF while driver 2 is active. Tests multi-driver resolution and identification of the specific X-contributing driver.

expected.description: X traces from output through bus receiver back to driver 2 FF (ff_d2.Q). Tool must identify driver 2 among 4 tri-state drivers by checking which bufif1 is enabled. Naive tools may report all 4 drivers.
